'''Republic Engineering Corporation''', previously [[Republic Fleet Systems]], was a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-manufacturing corporation.

==History==
The company was founded by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] shortly after the death of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] first contacted the company to build [[Shieldship]]s for protection against [[Nkllon/Legends|Nkllon's]] intense sun. The company was also responsible for spearheading the engineering side of the [[New Class Modernization Program]]. Following [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] defeat, the company began focusing on smaller craft, such as [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and [[Airspeeder/Legends|speeders]].
